# REQ-FR-260033: Keyboard and Discoverability Support for Dual Graph Views

**Status**: Accepted
**Type**: Functional Requirement
**Module**: ui-shell, workspace-graph
**Affects**: keyboard interaction model, tooltip behavior, legend behavior
**Related ADRs**: ADR-260031
**Related Requirements**: REQ-FR-260030, REQ-FR-260031, REQ-FR-260032

## Summary

Dual graph views shall provide keyboard-operable navigation and interaction paths, plus discoverability aids (tooltips and legend) for node/edge semantics.

## Specification

1. Keyboard path includes shell controls, view tabs, graph focus target, and side panels.
2. Arrow keys move graph focus between nodes in active view.
3. Enter/Space selects focused node; Escape clears focus context.
4. Node tooltip on hover/focus shows full label and type.
5. Edge tooltip on hover/focus shows relationship label/type and direction when applicable.
6. Graph legend is available to explain node/edge states and connector-handle meaning.

## Rationale

Keyboard support and lightweight guidance are required to keep dual representations understandable and operable.

## Out of Scope

- Advanced assistive-navigation shortcuts beyond baseline keyboard support.
- Verbose tutorial overlays.
